rules.name: run-checks-before-pr
rules.evidence: run the following commands in that library's directory before creating a pull request: make format ... make lint ... make test

rules.name: no-double-backtick-edit
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (``code``). Use single backticks (`code`) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

rules.name: no-double-backtick-write
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (``code``). Use single backticks (`code`) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

uncompilable: General note that changes to a library may impact all of its dependents (dependency-awareness guidance, not tied to a specific tool call)
Overview/description of each library under libs/ (checkpoint, checkpoint-postgres, cli, langgraph, prebuilt, sdk-js, sdk-py) — documentation, not an actionable rule
Usage note that the TEST variable can be passed to `make test` to run a specific file or extra pytest options — a usage catalog with no attached obligation/prohibition
